---
title: "CV Result"
author: "Yue Zhang"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    keep_tex: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, kableExtra, here)
```

```{r}
get_model_results <- function(model_number){
  df <- read_csv(here::here(glue::glue("results/{model_number}_final_results.csv")),
                 col_types = cols(), col_select = -1)
  df$model_number <- model_number
  round_to <- 3
  models <- c("Logistic Regression",
              "Classification Tree",
              "XGBoost",
              "Random Forest")
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(precision=str_c(round(precision, round_to),"(", round(precision_std, round_to),")"),
           recall=str_c(round(recall, round_to)," (",round(recall_std, round_to), ")"),
           roc_auc=str_c(round(roc_auc, round_to)," (",round(roc_auc_std, round_to),")"),
           accuracy=str_c(round(accuracy, round_to),"(",round(accuracy_std, round_to),")"),
           f1=str_c(round(f1, round_to),"(", round(f1_std, round_to),")")) %>%
    select(-contains("std")) %>%
    mutate(model_type = case_when(str_detect(model_type, "reg") ~ models[1],
                                  str_detect(model_type, "tree") ~ models[2],
                                  str_detect(model_type, "boost") ~ models[3],
                                  str_detect(model_type, "rf") ~ models[4])) %>%
    rename(` ` = model_type,
           Precision = precision,
           Recall = recall,
           `AUC` = roc_auc,
           Accuracy = accuracy,
           F1 = f1)
  return(df)
}
```

```{r, message=FALSE}
model_list <- c("01_model_1",
                "02_model_2",
                "03_model_1a",
                "04_model_2a",
                "05_model_1b",
                "06_model_2b")
res <- map_dfr(model_list, get_model_results)

```

```{r}
res <- res %>% 
  mutate(
    # detect mask/protective behaviour based on “_1”
    target = ifelse(str_detect(model_number, "_1"), "face mask", "protective behaviour"),
    # detect time period
    model_number = case_when(str_detect(model_number, "a") ~ "before mandate",
                             str_detect(model_number, "b") ~ "after mandate",
                             TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    # new data label
    model_number = str_c(model_number, target, sep="-")
  )%>%
  arrange(model_number) %>%
  drop_na()
```

```{r}
res %>% 
  select(-model_number, -target) %>% # remove assist column
  select(` `, `AUC`, everything()) %>% # put AUC column to first column
  kable(booktabs=TRUE, 
        caption="Five-fold cross validation results for each model and modelling scenario.  Values are given as mean (standard error).",
        align="lrrrrr") %>% 
  pack_rows(index=table(res$model_number)) %>% # add title to different group
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "scale_up"))
```
